summary.key_theme: 公司近期股價波動劇烈，儘管有與 Rohde & Schwarz 的策略合作利多，但市場對其高估值與半導體產業整體下行壓力仍存有高度疑慮。

bullish.title: FormFactor RF Pact With Rohde And Schwarz Meets Lofty Valuation Expectations
bullish.reason: 與 Rohde & Schwarz 達成射頻 (RF) 測試協議，被視為能支撐公司目前高估值的關鍵業務進展，展現技術競爭力。

bullish.title: Bull of the Day: FormFactor (FORM)
bullish.reason: Zacks 將其評選為當日看漲個股，反映出技術面或短期動能指標受到分析師青睞。

bullish.title: Entegris, Texas Instruments, Photronics, FormFactor, and Amkor Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 報導指出 FORM 股價出現強勁上漲，顯示市場對其短期成長前景的樂觀情緒。

bearish.title: 3 Reasons FORM is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
bearish.reason: 分析師明確指出 FORM 存在三大風險因素，建議投資人轉向其他標的，對股價構成直接負面壓力。

bearish.title: FormFactor, Lattice Semiconductor, Nova, Himax, and MACOM Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 報導涵蓋多檔半導體設備股下跌，反映出產業鏈整體面臨賣壓，FORM 難以獨善其身。

bearish.title: Kulicke and Soffa, Lam Research, Monolithic Power Systems, MACOM, and FormFactor Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 持續性的股價回調報導，顯示投資人對半導體設備類股的獲利了結心態濃厚。

bearish.title: FormFactor, Western Digital, IPG Photonics, and Vishay Intertechnology Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 反映近期股價波動頻繁，市場對該公司股價修正的擔憂持續存在。

neutral.title: A Look At FormFactor (FORM) Valuation After A Strong Year Of Share Price Gains
neutral.reason: 客觀檢視過去一年股價漲幅後的估值水平，未給出明確買賣建議，僅提供數據參考。

neutral.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In FormFactor 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
neutral.reason: 純粹的歷史績效回顧，對當前股價走勢不具備實質影響力。
